instruction:
Given the schema below, generate a valid JSON object that strictly conforms to it. Both the flat fields and the parameters array are required.

Schema:
{
  "endpoint_name": "string",
  "base_url": "string",
  "http_method": "string (one of: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH)",
  "auth_required": "boolean",
  "version": "string",
  "parameters": [
    {
      "name": "string",
      "type": "string (one of: string, integer, boolean, array, object)",
      "required": "boolean",
      "description": "string"
    }
  ]
}
input: Generate API documentation for a POST endpoint that creates a new user, with 5 parameters mixing required and optional fields.

instruction:
Given the schema below, generate a valid JSON object that strictly conforms to it. All flat fields and the variables array must be present.

Schema:
{
  "dataset_id": "string",
  "title": "string",
  "collection_date": "string (YYYY-MM-DD)",
  "sample_size": "integer",
  "publicly_available": "boolean",
  "variables": [
    {
      "variable_name": "string",
      "data_type": "string (one of: numeric, categorical, boolean, text, datetime)",
      "description": "string",
      "has_missing_values": "boolean"
    }
  ]
}

instruction:
Given the schema below, generate a valid JSON object that strictly conforms to it. Nullable fields should be set to null when not applicable.

Schema:
{
  "reservation_id": "string (required)",
  "guest_name": "string (required)",
  "hotel": "string (required)",
  "check_in": "string (required, YYYY-MM-DD)",
  "check_out": "string (required, YYYY-MM-DD)",
  "special_requests": "string or null",
  "corporate_rate_code": "string or null",
  "loyalty_member_id": "string or null",
  "pre_paid": "boolean (required)",

}

instruction:
Given the schema below, generate a valid JSON object that strictly conforms to it. Optional fields must be null when not applicable to the filer.

Schema:
{
  "filing_id": "string (required)",
  "taxpayer_name": "string (required)",
  "tax_year": "integer (required)",
  "filing_status": "string (required, one of: single, married_filing_jointly, married_filing_separately, head_of_household)",
  "gross_income_usd": "integer (required)",
  "deductions_usd": "integer or null",
  "credits_claimed_usd": "integer or null",
  "tax_owed_usd": "integer (required)",
  "refund_usd": "integer or null",
  "filed_electronically": "boolean (required)"
}
input: Generate a tax filing record for a single filer with no credits claimed and a small tax refund for the 2023 tax year.

instruction:
Given the schema below, generate a valid JSON object that strictly conforms to it. Nullable fields should be null when the information is not yet available or not applicable.

Schema:
{
  "nomination_id": "string (required)",

  "year": "integer (required)",

}

instruction:
Given the schema below, generate a valid JSON object that strictly conforms to it. Nullable fields should be null when the data is unavailable or not yet applicable.

{
